name: Hot Tuna Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Medium pasta shells-cooked and drained
2 cans Tuna, chunk, light, 6 1/2 oz each, drained and flaked
2 cups Broccoli, florets, cooked and drained
2 cups Carrots, sliced, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the mayonnaise, lemon juice, mustard, sugar, basil, and salt.
2. Stir in the shells, tuna, and vegetables.
3. Serve hot. Refrigerate leftovers.
